headline: Rising oil prices could increase food costs—but hoarding groceries ‘makes a bad situation worse,’ economist says
summary: Rising oil prices can take months to filter into grocery bills, and the impact is often smaller than consumers expect.

raw.headline: Rising oil prices could increase food costs—but hoarding groceries ‘makes a bad situation worse,’ economist says
raw.summary: Rising oil prices can take months to filter into grocery bills, and the impact is often smaller than consumers expect.

headline: CNBC Daily Open: 'Period of destruction' paused after Iran's 'present'
summary: President Trump says he will extend a pause on Iranian energy attacks to April 6 after 10 ships were allowed passage through the Strait of Hormuz.

raw.headline: CNBC Daily Open: 'Period of destruction' paused after Iran's 'present'
raw.summary: President Trump says he will extend a pause on Iranian energy attacks to April 6 after 10 ships were allowed passage through the Strait of Hormuz.
